summary: Two typosquatted package names installed: `lodahs` (transposition of `lodash`, distance 1) and `raect` (transposition of `react`, distance 1).
attack: The entry vector used by the August 2025 10-package credential-harvester campaign and the typosquat that seeded the Axios DPRK case. Experimental rule, opted into via jadguard.config.json.
